## Watchlist — 2026-05-29

Market conditions are favorable. Risk-on tone, Nasdaq +1.7% pre-market, AI/semi rally in progress, S&P near record highs. Proceeding with candidates.

---

**SYMBOL:** NVDA
**THESIS:** Post-earnings momentum catalyst — Nvidia typically reports in late May and if guidance beat (as has been pattern), the stock enters a multi-day institutional accumulation phase aligned with the AI infrastructure rally called out in today's market context.
**ENTRY_AROUND:** ~$148–152 (verify at open; look for a flat or mild pullback off the pre-market spike to find a better entry than the gap-open)
**STOP_LOSS:** ~$138–141 (~7% below entry)
**TARGET:** $170–182 (+15–20%)
> **Caution:** Confirm earnings were >3 days ago before entry. If they reported yesterday, wait one session for the volatility to settle unless momentum is clean.

---

**SYMBOL:** AMD
**THESIS:** AMD's AI GPU and data center segment is capturing market share from hyperscalers diversifying from NVDA, with the semi sector tailwind directly supporting its momentum above the 50-day MA.
**ENTRY_AROUND:** ~$185–192 (look for a pullback into the VWAP or yesterday's close on the open)
**STOP_LOSS:** ~$172–179 (~7% below entry)
**TARGET:** $213–230 (+15–20%)

---

**SYMBOL:** META
**THESIS:** Meta's AI infrastructure capex story (custom silicon, Llama ecosystem) plus robust ad revenue growth puts it squarely in both AI infrastructure and consumer discretionary tailwinds — reported April, no earnings risk for ~8 weeks.
**ENTRY_AROUND:** ~$700–720
**STOP_LOSS:** ~$651–670 (~7% below entry)
**TARGET:** $805–864 (+15–20%)

---

**SYMBOL:** ARM
**THESIS:** ARM Holdings is the IP layer under the AI chip buildout — every custom AI accelerator (Apple, Google, Amazon, NVDA Grace) runs ARM architecture, giving it earnings leverage to the entire sector rally without direct chip execution risk.
**ENTRY_AROUND:** ~$215–225
**STOP_LOSS:** ~$200–209 (~7% below entry)
**TARGET:** $247–270 (+15–20%)

---

**SYMBOL:** AVGO
**THESIS:** Broadcom's custom AI ASIC business for hyperscalers (Google TPU, Meta XPU) is a direct play on AI infrastructure spending diversification; earnings typically early June so confirm no report in the next 3 days before entry.
**ENTRY_AROUND:** ~$265–275
**STOP_LOSS:** ~$247–256 (~7% below entry)
**TARGET:** $305–330 (+15–20%)
> **Caution:** Verify AVGO earnings date — they sometimes report late May. If within 3 days, skip this one.

---

## Pre-Entry Checklist (for all 5)
- [ ] Confirm price is above 50-day MA at market open
- [ ] Confirm RSI < 70 (avoid chasing overbought opens)
- [ ] Confirm volume is tracking above average by 10:00 AM
- [ ] Verify earnings dates via broker or finviz before placing orders
- [ ] Position size: $5,000 max per name (~$47k total if all 5 entered — within 50% deployment cap at current portfolio size)

**Priority order given today's catalyst:** NVDA > ARM > AMD > META > AVGO
